full2024evidence.title: Evidence-Centric Synthesis in Scientific Writing
full2024evidence.abstract: This study presents a structured pipeline for synthesis. We employed a comparative design and observed significant gains in consistency. However, limitations remain in multilingual transfer.

full2023qa.title: Quality Assurance for Academic Claims
full2023qa.abstract: We used a verification framework to inspect citations and found improved precision. Results show effective reduction of unsupported claims.
